resolution_evidence: Status agreement was 27/30. The three disagreements map uniquely under codebook v2 without new guidance: C0088 is boundary because it supplies specific fixed-course reporting and safety practices; C0128 is included because it serializes explicit lanelet geometry; C0180 is included because source-native obstacle placement parameterizes spatial course constraints. No operational boundary recurred in two unresolved records, so systematic ambiguity is false and the release gate passes.
